confidence_rationale: Loop deployment and early phases clearly visible, but final loop position and exact placement at marked line difficult to assess precisely due to camera angle and lighting. No obvious penalties observed but precise measurement of loop position challenging.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from marked line on appendage due to viewing angle
Precise tightness of final cinch - appears secure but exact tension not measurable
Whether loop is exactly at the marked line or slightly off
technique_summary: Novice-level performance with prolonged deployment phase (60s vs 10-20s expert benchmark). Methodical approach with careful handling throughout all phases.
strengths: No apparent loop damage or deployment errors
improvement_suggestions: Practice loop deployment to reduce from 60s to under 30s
Work on faster target approach while maintaining precision
Focus on more efficient instrument handling during deployment phase
